lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਟੋਲਾ ਤੈ ਸਹਿ ਦਿਤਾ ਢਕਣ ਕੂ ਪਤਿ ਮੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: prem pattolaa tai seh ditaa dtakan koo pat meree |
lines.english: O Husband Lord, You have given me the silk gown of Your Love to cover and protect my honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈਡੈ ਸਿਮਰਣਿ ਹਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਲਧਮੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਨ ਡਿਠਮੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: taiddai simaran habh kichh ladham bikham na ddittham koee |
lines.english: By Your meditative remembrance, I have found everything; nothing seems difficult to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨਾ ਬੀਨਾ ਸਾਈ ਮੈਡਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ਤੇਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: daanaa beenaa saaee maiddaa naanak saar na jaanaa teree |1|
lines.english: You are all-wise and all-knowing, O my Master; Nanak: I have not appreciated Your value, Lord. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਘਣਾ ਦਯਿ ਧਿਆਇਐ ॥
lines.translit: hovai sukh ghanaa day dhiaaeiai |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, there comes a great peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪਤਿ ਰਖੈ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਟਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis pat rakhai sachaa saahib naanak mett na sakai koee |2|
lines.english: One whose honor the True Lord Master has preserved - O Nanak, no one can dishonor him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੰਞੈ ਰੋਗਾ ਘਾਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਐ ॥
lines.translit: vanyai rogaa ghaan har gun gaaeiai |
lines.english: Multitudes of illnesses vanish, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਆਸ ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਐ ॥
lines.translit: pooran hovai aas naae man vasaaeiai |
lines.english: One's hopes are fulfilled, when one's mind is filled with the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਠਾਢਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਇਐ ॥
lines.translit: andar varatai tthaadt prabh chit aaeiai |
lines.english: Utter peace pervades within, when God comes to mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਐ ॥
lines.translit: koe na lagai bighan aap gavaaeiai |
lines.english: No obstacles stand in the way, when one eliminates his self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਐ ॥
lines.translit: giaan padaarath mat gur te paaeiai |
lines.english: The intellect attains the blessing of spiritual wisdom from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਛਾਇਐ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: toon sabhanaa kaa khasam sabh teree chhaaeiai |8|
lines.english: You are the Lord and Master of all; all are under Your Protection. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਪਾਏ ਸਭੇ ਥੋਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਦਿਵਾਇਐ ॥
lines.translit: tin paae sabhe thok jis aap divaaeiai |
lines.english: He receives everything, unto whom the Lord Himself gives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਸਹ ਚਰਣੀ ਮੈਡਾ ਹੀਅੜਾ ਸੀਤਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੁਲਹਾ ਬੇੜੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tau seh charanee maiddaa heearraa seetam har naanak tulahaa berree |1|
lines.english: O Lord, my heart is attached to Your Feet; the Lord is Nanak's raft and boat. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦੀ ਤਰੰਦੜੀ ਮੈਡਾ ਖੋਜੁ ਨ ਖੁੰਭੈ ਮੰਝਿ ਮੁਹਬਤਿ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: nadee tarandarree maiddaa khoj na khunbhai manjh muhabat teree |
lines.english: Crossing the stream, my foot does not get stuck - I am filled with love for You.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਦਿਸੰਦੜਿਆ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਵੰਞੈ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਅਸਾਡੜੇ ਸੇਈ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa disandarriaa duramat vanyai mitr asaaddarre seee |
lines.english: The sight of them banishes my evil-mindedness; they are my only true friends.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਢੂਢੇਦੀ ਜਗੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਕੇਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau dtoodtedee jag sabaaeaa jan naanak virale keee |2|
lines.english: I have searched the whole world; O servant Nanak, how rare are such persons! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵੈ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਤੇਰਿਆ ਭਗਤਾ ਡਿਠਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aavai saahib chit teriaa bhagataa dditthiaa |
lines.english: You come to mind, O Lord and Master, when I behold Your devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਕਟੀਐ ਮੈਲੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਵੁਠਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: man kee katteeai mail saadhasang vutthiaa |
lines.english: The filth of my mind is removed, when I dwell in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਭਉ ਕਟੀਐ ਜਨ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਜਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran bhau katteeai jan kaa sabad jap |
lines.english: The fear of birth and death is dispelled, meditating on the Word of His humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਖੋਲਨੑਿ ਸੰਤ ਦੂਤ ਸਭਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਛਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan kholana sant doot sabh jaeh chhap |
lines.english: The Saints untie the bonds, and all the demons are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚੀ ਹੂੰ ਊਚਾ ਥਾਨੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aoochee hoon aoochaa thaan agam apaareea |
lines.english: The seat of the inaccessible and infinite Lord is the highest of the high.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਇਨੑਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਜਿਸ ਦੀ ਸਭ ਧਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis siau laaeina rang jis dee sabh dhaareea |
lines.english: They inspire us to love Him, the One who established the entire universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਾਂ ਭਗਤ ਸੰਗੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: jaa aape hoe deaal taan bhagat sang paaeeai |9|
lines.english: When the Lord Himself becomes merciful, then we attain the Society of His devotees. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: rain dinas kar jorr saas saas dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: Night and day, with your palms pressed together, with each and every breath, meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਰਿ ਵਿਡਾਨੜੈ ਹੁੰਮਸ ਧੁੰਮਸ ਕੂਕਾ ਪਈਆ ਰਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: baar viddaanarrai hunmas dhunmas kookaa peea raahee |
lines.english: In this wondrous forest of the world, there is chaos and confusion; shrieks emanate from the highways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਸਹ ਸੇਤੀ ਲਗੜੀ ਡੋਰੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਦ ਸੇਤੀ ਬਨੁ ਗਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tau seh setee lagarree ddoree naanak anad setee ban gaahee |1|
lines.english: I am in love with You, O my Husband Lord; O Nanak, I cross the jungle joyfully. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਬੈਸਕ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਿਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sachee baisak tinaa sang jin sang japeeai naau |
lines.english: The true society is the company of those who meditate on the Name of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੰਗੁ ਨ ਕੀਚਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨਾ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੁਆਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tina sang sang na keechee naanak jinaa aapanaa suaau |2|
lines.english: Do not associate with those, O Nanak, who look out only for their own interests. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਵੇਲਾ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: saa velaa paravaan jit satigur bhettiaa |
lines.english: Approved is that time, when one meets the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇਆ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਥਾਨੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਗਰਭਿ ਨ ਲੇਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paaeaa nihachal thaan fir garabh na lettiaa |
lines.english: When he attains the eternal place, he does not have to enter the womb again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਆ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੂਖ ਨ ਤੇਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hoaa saadhoo sang fir dookh na tettiaa |
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, he does not suffer pain again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਲਾਇ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਮੇਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tat giaan laae dhiaan drisatt samettiaa |
lines.english: He focuses his meditation on the essence of spiritual wisdom, and withdraws his attention from other sights.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੋ ਜਪੀਐ ਜਾਪੁ ਜਿ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਬੋਲੇਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabho japeeai jaap ji mukhahu bolettiaa |
lines.english: All chants are chanted by one who chants them with his mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਆਇਆ ਇਕੁ ਸਗਲ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੇਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nadaree aaeaa ik sagal brahamettiaa |
lines.english: He comes to see the One God everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਖਿ ਖਜਾਨੈ ਪਾਏ ਸੇ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਖੋਟਿਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: parakh khajaanai paae se bahurr na khottiaa |10|
lines.english: Those who are assayed, and placed in the Lord's treasury, are not declared counterfeit again. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਬੁਝਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੁਖੇਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hukame bujh nihaal sukh sukhettiaa |
lines.english: Realizing the Hukam of the Lord's Command, he becomes happy, and he is filled with peace and tranquility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ਮਿਲੰਨਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖ ਸੰਬੂਹ ਸਚੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: je so dhanee milan naanak sukh sanbooh sach |1|
lines.english: If only the Master would come to meet me! O Nanak, I would then obtain all the true comforts. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੋਹੇ ਜੰਬੂਰ ਖਵੇ ਨ ਵੰਞਨਿ ਗਾਖੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: vichhohe janboor khave na vanyan gaakharre |
lines.english: The pincers of separation are so painful to endure.
